component.name: Q3N Manager
component.summary: Browse and edit Q3N quote collections

description.p: Q3N (Quote Triple-Slash Notation) is a plain-text format and toolchain for storing quotations and citations with source URIs. The Q3N Manager provides a graphical interface for browsing, editing, searching, and exporting your quote collections.

ul.li: Create and edit Q3N files with a multi-page entry wizard
Browse and search entries by tag, scheme, or text
Inline URI validation with per-scheme rules (ISBN checksum, DOI format, arXiv ID, etc.)
Export to JSON, Markdown, HTML, Plain Text, Markdown Index, or Fortune format
Plugin system: fortune cookie sidebar, citation formatter (MLA/APA/Chicago/BibTeX)
Supports 14 URI schemes: https, isbn, doi, arxiv, pubmed, yt, spotify, orcid, q3n, file, osm, geo, overpass

description.p: Fixed q3n run/cite failing when installed as a .deb package. Fixed q3n fortune scanning the home directory slowly. Added empty-entries guard to q3n run fortune.
Added ASCII banner to CLI and website hero. Minor refinements.
Added OSM/GIS URI schemes (osm://, geo:, overpass://). Launched download site at q3n.distorted.work. GUI wizard supports new map source types.
Initial public release. Core Q3N format, CLI, PySide6 GUI, plugin system with fortune and citation plugins, schema validation, JavaScript parser.
